description: Letter from Benaya b. Mūsā, from Tinnis, to Nissim b. Ḥalfon, Fustat. Around 1060. Regarding a shipment of scarlet for the Byzantines that was sold to local Jews. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #604) VMR
tags: amir al-juyush, trade, Byzantines, Byzantine merchants
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מ-Tinnīs לפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
